# Ekkos Technologies Inc.

> Canadian AI company building ekkOS — the persistent memory infrastructure for AI agents, robotics, and enterprise systems.

## About

Ekkos Technologies Inc. is the company behind ekkOS, a cognitive substrate and memory infrastructure for intelligent systems. Based in Canada, we build the foundational memory layer that makes AI agents smarter over time.

## Products

- **ekkOS**: Persistent memory for AI coding tools (Claude Code, ChatGPT, Cursor).
- **ekkOS Labs**: Research division exploring cognitive architectures for AGI.
- **ekkOS SDK**: Developer toolkit for integrating persistent memory into any AI application.

## Links

- Product: https://ekkos.dev
- Company: https://ekkos.ca
- Documentation: https://docs.ekkos.dev
- Research: https://ekkoslabs.com
